---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality, an integrator, an operator, or an API change
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want to do

The use case in plain terms — the simulation, analysis, or workflow that is not possible (or is awkward) today.

## Scientific context

If the request is physics-driven: the regime, the published reference, the operator class. If tooling-driven: the workflow it unblocks.

## Proposed approach (optional)

Sketch of API surface or implementation if you have one in mind.

## Alternatives considered

What you tried that did not work, or workarounds that are unsatisfactory.

## Scope

- [ ] Core (`apsis`)
- [ ] Operator crate (existing or new)
- [ ] Python distribution (`apsis-python`)
- [ ] App (`apsis-app`)
- [ ] CI / docs / tooling
